Class MapSelectionScene

java.lang.Object
view.scene.GameScene
view.scene.MapSelectionScene
public class MapSelectionScene extends GameScene
Represents the pre-game menu scene where players select the battlefield map. Displays interactive map cards with visual previews and handles the transition to the next game state once a map is chosen.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • MapSelectionScene

      public MapSelectionScene(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, Consumer<String> onMapSelected)
      Constructs the Map Selection Scene, initializing the layout, title, and interactive map cards.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - the main JavaFX stage to bind initial dimensions from
      onMapSelected - a callback executed when a map is successfully chosen by the user

  • Method Details

    • begin

      public void begin()
      Initializes the scene's behavior by starting the background music loop. This is called by the application exactly when the scene is shown.
      Specified by:
      begin in class GameScene
